picks.analysis: RDDT scores +17 — a Strong Call recommendation. The bullish read is led by Fundamentals (+7), reinforced by Narrative (+7). The biggest contributors are Positive Catalyst (+3, bullish), Earnings Surprise (+2, +79.1%), Guidance (+2, +54.7%). Cutting the other way: Support/Resistance (-1, ±1.7% to R), Put/Call Ratio Extreme (-1, 0.46 P/C). Within Communication Services we gave RDDT a +17 and SPOT a +14 — same direction, lower conviction — which is why we'd take RDDT calls over SPOT calls, mainly on Technicals (+3 vs +1) and Fundamentals (+7 vs +6). The suggested calls sit ~14.8% OTM with 48d to expiry, delta 0.34, mid $8.45 — well inside the 5-30% OTM / Δ 0.20-0.40 / ≤$35 premium / standard-monthly criteria.

reasons.mechanical: A surge in put buying / put-call pushing back above ~1.25 confirms the turn.
reasons.narrative: If "Aerospace & Defense Spending" flips against the trade, the reason for the position is gone — exit on the narrative, not the chart.

levels.prose: A close below 20-day support breaks the structure the trade is built on.
levels.proseAi: Cut the position if the daily close breaks below 20-day support, signaling the end of the trend.

triggers: Exit before earnings (2026-07-22): the post-report IV crush can erase a long premium even when the direction is right.
Time stop: don't carry into the final week before Sep 17 '26 — theta accelerates and the breakeven move gets harder each day.
Thesis check: if a higher-scoring setup appears or the original reason for the trade stops being true, rotate out regardless of price.
exitPlan.overviewAi: Take profits into strength at key resistance, trim on volume breakouts, and cut losses if support breaks.

picks.analysis: GD scores +16 — a Strong Call recommendation. The bullish read is led by Fundamentals (+7), reinforced by Narrative (+6). The biggest contributors are Positive Catalyst (+3, bullish), Guidance (+2, +7.7%), Streak (+2, 3d green). Cutting the other way: Support/Resistance (-1, ±1.9% to R), Short Interest % (-1, 1.1%). Within Industrials, the next-closest same-direction peer is CAT at +11 — well below GD's +16 (GD leads on Technicals (+3 vs +0) and Fundamentals (+7 vs +5)), so GD is the cleaner calls expression. The suggested calls sit ~9.5% OTM with 111d to expiry, delta 0.31, mid $7.00 — well inside the 5-30% OTM / Δ 0.20-0.40 / ≤$35 premium / standard-monthly criteria.
